description: A group of male vocalists sing this happy, upbeat country /bluegrass song. The tempo is fast with vigorous and animated acoustic guitar, banjo, mandolin and auto harp lead and harmony. The song is a live performance with ambient sounds of clapping, cheering and people talking. This song is a cheerful Country Pop/Bluegrass song.
lead_instrument: acoustic guitar, banjo, mandolin, auto harp
accompaniment: ambient sounds of clapping, cheering and people talking
